subject: Re: Code Review - PR #937
content:
Team,

I've been analyzing the error rate data from last week and noticed some interesting trends:

- error rate decreased by 28% compared to the previous week
- The APAC region is underperforming by a factor of 1.4x
- We're seeing a correlation between error rate and throughput
- The Catalyst rollout appears to have had no measurable impact

Dashboard link: https://grafana.internal/f26b2184ca

I think this warrants a deeper investigation. Tina, could you pull the raw data from CI/CD Platform so we can cross-reference with User Directory?

Best,
Rachel
--
Rachel Moore
DevOps Engineer | Cyberdyne
